Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-07-2003 Continued To Aug-21-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Paul J. Steiner, Esq. of LERNER & VEIT 981-6100, specially appearing for respondent Regina Delaney, moving to vacate the judgment
Forden Athearn appearing in propria persona 885-4590, opposing the motion

RULING:
Upon counsel's representation, the Court vacated its tentative ruling and ordered continued DEFENDANT REGINA DELANEY'S Motion To Vacate Judgment. Off the record counsel stipulated to the following schedule: Supplemental brief due on 8/11, Supplemental opposition on 8/15 and supplemental reply on 8/18. Hearing is continued to August 21, 2003. Counsel to deliver courtesy copies to the Court with cover letter referencing the schedule. (JLW/301) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR #7855
